Projects

This Webpage

Hello and welcome to this webpage. My name is lennobay, I created this one. My goal is to have sleak design and a easy way to format my text and then to publish it. I am utilising Markdown for it. I know you might think: "what sleak design ?" but I assure you, it will come one day.

History of the Webpage

I started the creation of this Website maybe 2 Years ago. That does not mean it was always this style and way of transporting data. Rather I created the designs, published them and then deleted or forgot about them and after finding new insperation, I started a new iteration.

This iteration

This version consist out of vanilla, client only markdown to html converter. Which totally is not developed fully developt at the moment but at least hasr Styles H1, H2, H3 and P.

Should you not know the meaning of the "Symbols", I will explain it to you. The H in H1 and etc. stands for header, headtext, I am not so sure. You can imagine it as an class which attributes I can change through CSS or JS. CSS being the way to style HTML documents. That means changing color, font weight and font size. I can apply this attributes on all H1 either in a hierarchy, in a new class or even with an ID.

Should I ever have Code snippet support, I will past it in.

At last

Furthermore I will surely develop everything later, should I not forget it. But to my defence, I created this Markdown to HTML, yesterday evening at 22:00. When I suddenly had an Idea to do so and make my life easier. As I have other projects.
